sourcePrompt: A long-tailed macaque sitting on its haunches, about half a meter tall seated, with a tail longer than its body curling behind. A small monkey leaning slightly forward, hands resting in front, with a round expressive pinkish face under a cap of swept fur and close-set watchful eyes. Short tan-brown fur shading paler at the chest, compact and inquisitive. Low-poly, game-ready, clean hard edges.
